dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your business today.

products.subtitle: Product catalog and inventory management
products.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

products.parentBarcodeHintConfigurable: For configurable products, sellable barcodes should be set on variants.

products.imageHelp: Upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image up to 5 MB.
products.imageDeleteFailed: Product saved, but the previous image could not be removed.
products.imageDeleteOnRemoveFailed: Product updated, but the removed image could not be deleted.
products.imageDeleteOnProductDeleteFailed: Product deleted, but its image could not be removed.
products.invalidImageType: Unsupported image type. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WEBP.
products.imageTooLarge: Image exceeds maximum size of 5 MB.
products.noPermission: You don't have permission to manage products
products.noProductsSearch: We couldn't find any products matching "{{query}}". Try adjusting your search terms.
products.emptyProductsCatalog: Your product catalog is empty. Add your first product to get started with inventory management.
products.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this product? This action cannot be undone.

variants.title: Product Variants
variants.barcodeHelp: Variant barcodes are used for configurable-product sales.
variants.confirmDeleteVariant: Are you sure you want to delete this variant?
variants.confirmConvertToConfigurable: This will enable variants for this product. You can add variants manually or generate them from attributes.
variants.confirmConvertToSimple: This will disable variants and delete all variant settings. This action cannot be undone.
variants.cannotConvertWithVariants: Cannot convert product with variants. Please delete all variants first.

attributes.title: Product Attributes
attributes.confirmDeleteAttribute: Are you sure you want to delete this attribute?
attributes.attributeInUse: This attribute is in use by product variants and cannot be deleted.
attributes.attributeSlugHelp: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
attributes.attributeValuesHelp: Add possible values for this attribute (e.g., Red, Blue, Green for Color)

orders.subtitle: Manage orders and transactions

orders.noOrdersYetDesc: Get started by creating your first order. Orders will appear here once created.
orders.noOrdersWithStatusDesc: There are currently no orders with the status "{status}".
orders.clickToAdd: Click on any product card to add it to your order
orders.scanBarcodePlaceholder: Scan or enter barcode and press Enter
orders.scanBarcodeHelp: Variant barcodes are matched first. Simple-product barcodes are used when no variant matches.
orders.barcodeNotFound: No sellable product was found for that barcode.
orders.barcodeInactive: The scanned barcode belongs to an inactive item.
orders.barcodeOutOfStock: The scanned barcode is out of stock.
orders.taxDisabled: Tax calculation is disabled in settings
orders.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this order? This action cannot be undone.
orders.selectCustomerPlaceholder: Select a customer or leave blank for walk-in

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Customer management and relationship tracking
customers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this customer?
customers.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this customer? This action cannot be undone.
customers.noCustomersSearch: We couldn't find any customers matching "{{query}}". Try adjusting your search terms.
customers.emptyCustomers: Your customer list is empty. Add your first customer to get started with customer management.
customers.taxExemptDescription: This customer is exempt from tax charges
customers.noPermission: You don't have permission to manage customers
customers.contactPersonOptional: Optional contact person details for this account
customers.companyNameBusinessHelp: Required when this customer is a business account
customers.companyNameOptionalHelp: Use this when the customer belongs to a company
customers.customerSegmentHelp: Use a lean segment that helps staff recognize this customer quickly
customers.preferredContactMethodHelp: Helps staff follow up using the channel this customer expects
customers.referenceCodeHelp: Store the one code, chart, invoice, or identifier your team actually uses
customers.tagsHelp: Separate tags with commas to make search and grouping easier
customers.internalNotesHelp: For staff-only reminders that should not replace service-specific notes
customers.activeCustomerHelp: This customer can be used in sales and follow-ups
customers.inactiveCustomerHelp: Keep the record, but hide it from normal customer selection flows
customers.duplicateEmail: A customer with this email already exists

general.label: General retail
general.helper: Use for most stores that only need a flexible customer record.
general.referencePlaceholder: Customer code, loyalty ID, or account number
general.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Purchase habits, preferred items, delivery notes, or follow-up reminders
general.serviceNotesHelp: Keep only the service details your team checks often.

butcher.label: Butcher shop
butcher.helper: Track cut preferences, thickness, packaging, and pickup cadence.
butcher.referencePlaceholder: Locker, account, or standing order code
butcher.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Preferred cuts, portion size, vacuum pack requests, weekly pickup routine
butcher.serviceNotesHelp: Focus on repeat prep details that help fulfill the order faster.

optical.label: Optical store
optical.helper: Useful for frame, lens, and reminder details without storing a full medical chart.
optical.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Lens type, frame style, PD note, remake reminders, pickup preference
optical.serviceNotesHelp: Keep the practical optical notes staff needs during service and delivery.

medical.label: Medical
medical.helper: Keep lightweight care, refill, or scheduling context for repeat patients or accounts.
medical.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Care reminders, refill cadence, preferred schedule, family contact note
medical.serviceNotesHelp: Avoid full records here; keep only operational notes your front desk needs.

grocery.label: Grocery store
grocery.helper: Good for delivery preferences, recurring baskets, and invoice-friendly accounts.
grocery.referencePlaceholder: House account, route, or invoice code
grocery.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Delivery window, recurring basket, substitute rules, invoice preference
grocery.serviceNotesHelp: Capture repeat shopping patterns and fulfillment preferences.

disposable.label: Disposable products
disposable.helper: Useful for wholesale replenishment, pack sizes, and repeat restocking notes.
disposable.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Pack size, reorder cadence, preferred brands, bulk delivery note
disposable.serviceNotesHelp: Keep the restocking details that help sales staff prepare repeat orders.

other.label: Other
other.helper: Use when the record needs a few tailored notes but does not fit the presets above.
other.referencePlaceholder: Internal reference or external account code
other.serviceNotesPlaceholder: Add the few business-specific details your team needs for repeat service
other.serviceNotesHelp: Stay lean and store only the context that changes daily operations.

members.subtitle: Staff member management and permissions
members.deleteMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this member?
members.noPermissionMembers: You don't have permission to view the members page. Contact your administrator for access.
members.emptyTeam: Your team is empty. Add your first team member to get started with user management.

members.leaveBlankKeepCurrent: Leave blank to keep current password
members.passwordResetHint: Leave blank to keep the current password. Enter a new password to reset it.
members.noArchivedUsersDesc: No archived users found. Users will appear here when they are archived.
members.archiveUserMessage: This user will be archived and won't appear in login dropdown. Their order history will be preserved. You can restore them later if needed.
members.restoreUserMessage: This user will be restored and will appear in login dropdown again. They will be able to log in with their existing credentials.
members.permanentDeleteMessage: WARNING: This action cannot be undone! The user will be permanently deleted from the system and their order history will be preserved but no longer associated with them.

settings.subtitle: Configure your POS system preferences and company information

settings.developerToolsDesc: Tools and utilities for development and testing.
settings.resetLocalDbDesc: Wipe all local tables and re-pull everything from the remote Turso database. Use this when local data looks corrupted or out of sync.

settings.resetLocalDbWarning: This will delete all local data and re-download everything from Turso. Any unsynced local changes will be lost.
settings.resetLocalDbSuccess: Local database reset and re-synced successfully.
